description.en:
PropertyScout ID [hidden phone]


Pet friendly 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom condo for sale with a floorsize of 52 squaremeters, located on the 20th floor, at M Silom
building, in the popular Bang Rak district near BTS Chong Nonsi and near MRT Sam Yan. Please contact us to schedule a viewing.

Unit amenities:
 * Refrigerator
 * Microwave
 * Stove
 * Balcony

Building features:
 * Building completed in 2012
 * Gym
 * Relaxing swimming pool
 * Security cameras
 * 24-hours security
 * Covered car park
 * Sauna
 * Gym
 * Beautiful garden area on premise
 * BBQ area

description.en: This property is a 90 SqM condo with 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms that is available for sale. It is part of the M Silom project in Suriyawong, Bangkok and was completed in Dec 2012. You can buy this condo for a base price of ฿21,649,485 (฿240,550/SqM) and it is also available for long term rentals starting from ฿65,000 per month.

title.en: 2 Bedroom Condo for rent at M Silom
title.zh: 2 Bedroom Condo for rent at M Silom
title.th: 2 Bedroom Condo for rent at M Silom

summary.th: เช่า: 2 นอน 83 ตร.ม. ราคา 72,000 บาท (DotProperty #eb6456e7acf1-252f-d022-3846-0608a089)

description.en:
This a 83 Sqm 2 bed / 2 bathroom unit offers ensuite baths with built-in quality closets and amazing city views.

Fully equipped kitchen is completely fitted with luxurious European equipment that comprises every contemporary built-in appliance.

The living area has a dining room, large TV, large storage room, washer room and foyer to place your shoes.

The dining and living areas are spacious with beautiful city view from the balcony which ensures cool breeze any time of the year.

The unit offers hard wood flooring and marble throughout.
